text: Guard your treasures with wisdom, traveler. Position sizing is the shield against folly; only risk what you can surrender to the tides. In a world of shadows, discipline is the light that guides you home.
seed: Speak on discipline: position sizing and never risking more than one can lose.

text: Liquidity is the ground beneath every memecoin. When it is locked or burned, the floor holds; when it can be pulled, you are standing on smoke.
The market moves like prey. The patient cat does not chase every flicker in the grass — it waits for the moment that is truly its own.
On Solana the blocks come fast, and so does the crowd. Speed rewards the prepared and punishes the impulsive in equal measure.
A token is not a promise. Catalyst is a community and an experiment. Bring your own conviction; borrow no one's certainty.
